[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011110 4
1 0111111 6
2 0100011 3
3 0011111 5
4 0010000 1
5 1110011 5
6 0000100 1
7 0011110 4

01 10 0010111 4
12 21 0010000 1 match 4
23 32 0010000 1 match 4
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 0000100 1 match 6
56 65 0011110 4 match 0 7
67 76 0010100 2
70 07 1010100 3

02 20 0010000 1 match 4
13 31 0010011 3
24 42 0000000 a
35 53 0010010 2
46 64 0000100 1 match 6
57 75 0010100 2
60 06 0110111 5
71 17 0010100 2

03 30 1110011 5 match 5
14 41 0000100 1 match 6
25 52 0010000 1 match 4
36 63 0110011 4
47 74 0000100 1 match 6
50 05 0010110 3
61 16 0011111 5 match 3
72 27 0010000 1 match 4

04 40 0000100 1 match 6
15 51 0011110 4 match 0 7
26 62 0010000 1 match 4
37 73 1010000 2
